entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: Cajanus cajan (L.) Millsp., a legume crop studied for salinity tolerance

entities.name: SALINITY TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand high salt concentrations in the growth medium

entities.name: SALINITY
entities.description: High salt concentration in the growth medium, measured in ds/m

entities.name: ATYLOSIA
entities.description: A wild relative of pigeonpea

entities.description: A wild relative of pigeonpea

entities.name: DUNBARIA SP.
entities.description: A wild relative of pigeonpea

entities.name: A. ALBICANS
entities.description: A highly tolerant wild relative of pigeonpea

entities.name: ATYLOSIA PLATYCARPA
entities.description: A highly tolerant wild relative of pigeonpea

entities.name: SODIUM AND CHLORIDE EXCLUSION
entities.description: Physiological trait involving the exclusion of sodium and chloride from the shoot system

entities.name: POTASSIUM/SODIUM SELECTIVITY
entities.description: Physiological trait involving high selectivity of potassium over sodium

entities.name: SODIUM AND CHLORIDE RETENTION
entities.description: Physiological trait involving high retention of sodium and chloride in the root system

entities.name: F1 HYBRIDS
entities.description: First-generation offspring resulting from reciprocal crosses between A. albicans and pigeonpea genotype ICP 3783

entities.name: ICP 3783
entities.description: A sensitive pigeonpea genotype

entities.name: DOMINANT GENETIC FACTOR
entities.description: A genetic trait that is expressed in the F1 generation, suggesting dominance

entities.name: CALCIUM LEVELS
entities.description: The concentration of calcium in the growth medium

entities.name: RHIZOBIAL STRAINS
entities.description: Bacteria that form symbiotic relationships with pigeonpea

entities.name: IC 3087
entities.description: An efficient rhizobial strain for symbiotic ability under saline conditions

entities.description: An efficient rhizobial strain for symbiotic ability under saline conditions

entities.description: A less efficient rhizobial strain for symbiotic ability under saline conditions

entities.description: A less efficient rhizobial strain for symbiotic ability under saline conditions

entities.name: IC 3195
entities.description: A less efficient rhizobial strain for symbiotic ability under saline conditions

entities.name: SYMBIOTIC ABILITY
entities.description: The ability of pigeonpea to form symbiotic relationships under saline conditions
